body_txt: At worst, this is a potential sign of being a Humanoid Abomination , exposure to Things Man Was Not Meant to Know , or being possessed or corrupted by a demon or other entity, and is a small but very effective way to convey Body Horror . In more benign instances, extra irises or pupils can be a way that superpowers that are sight-based or eye-symbolic manifest, and can even be seen as a sign of being blessed by the gods or prophesied to do great things. Humorous cases are rare, but a sight gag in cartoons is for a character's pupil to move from one eye to the other to simulate the effect. Sub-Trope of Nightmare Face . Sister Trope to Exotic Eye Designs (unusual pupil and sclera colors and designs). Compare Wingding Eyes (eyes becoming symbols). Contrast Conjoined Eyes (a cartoony design shortcut where the scleras are merged together) and Prophet Eyes (solid white eyes with no iris or pupil).
